templates.name: Are there any transaction fees involved in making a payment?
templates.content: No, you will never be charged a transaction fee by Emma when you make a payment on our website.

templates.name: Are the Emma Mattresses fire retardant?
templates.content: Yes, Emma mattresses are fire retardant, but you should always be sure to follow fire safety guidelines approved by your local authority. Research them now if you haven't already!

templates.name: Can I use an electric blanket with my Emma mattress?
templates.content: Yes! Emma mattresses are suitable and safe to be used with electric blankets, but be sure to follow all of the safety advice that came with your electric blanket.

templates.name: Shouldn't I test a mattress first in person before purchasing?
templates.content: The days of having to test a mattress in-store are over, Emma offers every customer the chance to test their mattress at home for 365-days! We believe that our mattresses will provide an exceptionally relaxing and comfortable sleep, but if you haven't fallen in love, simply e-mail us and we'll pick it up free of charge.

templates.name: What kind of pillow is the Emma Foam Pillow?
templates.content: It's a multilayer memory foam pillow, and a global Emma favourite! Unique Airgocell® foam pairs up with cold foam and visco-elastic memory foam for both comfort and the perfect head and neck support. Never forget that pillows are a very important part of your sleep set up!

templates.name: What size is the Emma Original Pillow?
templates.content: The Emma Original Pillow is 40x70 cm.

templates.name: Does the foam smell?
templates.content: Like all new mattresses, Emma's can have a "new" smell at first, that should disappear within a couple of days of unpacking. Don't worry, nothing is wrong with your new mattress!

templates.name: Is the Emma Mattress compatible with any kind of bed frame?
templates.content: Yes, Emma mattresses fit with any bedframe of your choice, just be sure that the sizes match before you buy!

templates.name: How does the Emma Shift feel?
templates.content: The Emma Shift uses a Smart Valve control system that allows you to manually adjust the firmness or softness of the mattress infinitely and without using energy or electricity. You can choose your own level of comfort without compromising on support!

templates.name: When does the 10-year warranty start?
templates.content: The warranty begins as soon as you receive your Emma mattress.

templates.name: Does the foam of the Original smell?
templates.content: As the Emma Original is a bed-in-a-box mattress, it can occasionally include a slight odor as the foam layers and new materials air out for the first time. It uses foams certified by CertiPUR-US, which are tested to ensure a low level of VOC emissions that could affect indoor air quality. While there may be a slight odor after initially unboxing the mattress, the smell dissipates quickly and should be undetectable after a day or two.

templates.name: Do I need a Box Spring before I can use the Emma Mattress?
templates.content: Using a box spring is optional when using the Emma Oriignal Mattress. Our mattres is compatible with any type of bed frame; you can even lay it flat out on the floor!

templates.name: Does the CliMax foam smell?
templates.content: As the Emma CliMax is a bed-in-a-box mattress, it can occasionally include a slight odor as the foam layers and new materials air out for the first time. It uses foams certified by CertiPUR-US, which are tested to ensure a low level of VOC emissions that could affect indoor air quality. While there may be a slight odor after initially unboxing the mattress, the smell dissipates quickly and should be undetectable after a day or two.

templates.name: Is the Emma Original compatible with any kind of bed frame?
templates.content: The Emma Original is compatible with most bed frames, so long as their slats are no longer than 3 inches apart. It even works with adjustable bed frames!

templates.name: Is the CliMax Hybrid compatible with any kind of bed frame?
templates.content: The Emma CliMax is compatible with most bed frames, so long as their slats are no longer than 3 inches apart. It even works with adjustable bed frames!

templates.name: How does the Emma Hybrid Comfort feel?
templates.content: On a 1-10 scale (soft to firm), the Hybrid Comfort mattress strikes an ideal equilibrium 5 (medium firm). This translates to experiencing the plush, cloud-like comfort of contemporary memory foam, all the while receiving precisely the necessary support to relieve pressure from your back and hips as you enjoy a restful night's sleep.

templates.name: Warranty policy
templates.content:
Every mattress comes with a 10-year guaranteed warranty which covers damages caused by factory defects and/or faulty materials.
More information on our Terms and Conditions here: https://www.emma-sleep.com/pages/terms-and-conditions

templates.name: Do you offer financing?
templates.content: Yes! We offer Klarna and ShopPay as financing methods at checkout. We also offer lease-to-own financing with Koalafi. With a lease, you can split the cost into regular rental payments, and you have the option to pay off early to save: https://www.emma-sleep.com/pages/koalafi-financing

templates.name: Shipping time
templates.content: We ship via UPS and FedEx and once shipped it will take approximately 2-5 business days nationwide.

templates.name: Is the 365-Night trial applicable for all products?
templates.content: Emma mattresses come with a 365-night risk-free trial. As for our other Emma products, most come with a generous 60-night risk-free trial, except for the Wooden Bed Frame and the Adjustable Powerbases.

templates.name: Military / First responder / Healthcare / Teacher discount
templates.content: Thank you for your service! We aren't offering that type of discount at the moment, but if it helps, we are happy to show you the items we have on sale here: https://www.emma-sleep.com/pages/sale

templates.name: Phone support
templates.content: You can give us a call at 1-(855)-580-EMMA, Monday-Friday from 8am - 6pm UTC-6, or let me know if I can help via text, it may be faster.

templates.name: Social media
templates.content:
We'd love it if you followed us! 
Instagram https://www.instagram.com/emmasleep.us/ and 
Facebook https://www.facebook.com/EmmaSleepUS

templates.name: How does your 365 Night Trial work?
templates.content: Our risk-free 365-night trial means that you get a year to decide if your Emma mattress is a good fit for you. This gives you more time to try the mattress for yourself and experience the benefits that our 4 Million+ customers have come to enjoy every night!

templates.name: What is the difference between trial period vs warranty?
templates.content:
Our 365-Night Trial is a period where you can try our Emma products in the comfort of your own home, and at any time choose to return it if you think it is not suited for you.

Our 10-Year warranty on the other hand is your assurance of getting a replacement if damage existed prior to use.

templates.name: Is it free to return your products?
templates.content: It's 100% free to return your Emma product! If your Emma turns out not to suit you for any reason, please feel free to return it. Just simply get in contact with us via our chat support, phone, or email and we will refund and collect it at no cost to you. Live support is also available from 08:00 to 18:00 UTC-6, Monday-Friday!

templates.name: Wholesale inquiries
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! The best way to discuss wholesale is to email us directly at support@emma-sleep.com. Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: What condition can I return the mattress in?
templates.content: We kindly request that your product is in a donatable condition (e.g., no significant stains, tears, or other soiling including odors) before considering it for return, as we like to make sure our products can have a second life. To know more information, you may view our terms & conditions (Article VIII) here: https://www.emma-sleep.com/pages/terms-and-conditions

templates.name: Am I going to receive a full refund within my night trial?
templates.content: Definitely! With our 365-night risk-free trial, we will refund you the full amount should you choose to return your product; you won't even need to pay any shipping charges! You may view our terms & conditions (Article VIII) here: https://www.emma-sleep.com/pages/terms-and-conditions

templates.name: I received my mattress as a gift. Am I still eligible for the 10 year warranty?
templates.content:
Yes, of course! You can simply get in touch with us at support@emma-sleep.com and share the following to have your warranty processed:

- Proof of purchase
- Authorization from the purchaser that allows you to inquire about the order - this can be a form of a call or email from the purchaser

templates.name: Store location / retailer
templates.content: At the moment, our products are only available online at www.emma-sleep.com. However, we do offer a generous 365 nights risk-free trial period so you can try out the mattress in the comfort of your home, and if you feel that Emma isn't a perfect match for you, simply reach out to us, and we'll process your return.

templates.name: Will I always get a similar product model as my replacement due to a warranty claim?
templates.content: We guarantee that we will replace your Emma product with the same model as long as it is available. Otherwise, we will replace your mattress with a current model that is the same, or greater in value.

templates.name: Brand ambassador / sponsorship / affiliate program
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! The best way to discuss this is to email us directly at support@emma-sleep.com. Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: Do I need to keep the plastic on the mattress while I'm on the free trial?
templates.content: No need! You can relax and enjoy our Emma mattresses as you normally would any mattress. It's yours now. If you wish to return it later on, simply reach out to us and we'll take care of the rest!

templates.name: When will I receive my refund?
templates.content: After we have confirmed that you returned your Emma products, you can expect your full refund through your original payment method within 5-10 business days.

templates.name: Are the foams in the Emma Original Mattress CertiPUR-US Certified?
templates.content: Yes! Our Emma mattresses are CertiPUR-US Certified. This means that the mattresses are made of non-toxic materials and are safe for use!

templates.name: How firm is your Emma Original?
templates.content: The Emma Original Mattress is considered 'Medium Firm.' Our Sleep Experts have concluded that this is the firmness level suitable for most types of sleepers, as it offers just the right balance of pressure relief and support.

templates.name: Are the foams in the Emma Climax Mattress CertiPUR-US Certified?
templates.content: Yes! Our Emma mattresses are CertiPUR-US Certified. This means that the mattresses are made of non-toxic materials and are safe for use!

templates.name: Free shipping
templates.content: We offer free shipping on all orders within the contiguous United States.

templates.name: Return policy
templates.content: You can check out our detailed return policy here: https://www.emma-sleep.com/pages/frequently-asked-questions#trials-returns-and-refunds:~:text=Emma%20Customer%20Support%3F-,Trials%2C%20Returns%20and%20Refunds,-How%20does%20your

templates.name: Customer support
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to live chat with one of our reps via the website, give us a call at +1-888-580-3662, or send us an email at support@emma-sleep.com. We'll be happy to help!

templates.name: Is the Emma Original Mattress Vegan?
templates.content: Yes, the Emma Mattress is 100 % vegan and does not contain any animal-based materials. Unfortunately, the mattress is inedible. The foam used to make the Emma mattresses is CertiPUR-US® and Class I (16.0.93305) of STANDARD 100 by OEKO-TEX®, which means it is suitable even for infants.

templates.name: How do I take care of my Emma mattress?
templates.content: All Emma mattresses come with a removable and washable cover! Simply unzip the cover, and it separates into two parts. Washable below 140°F, you can also  handwash with gentle detergent on smaller stains.

templates.name: Can I schedule my delivery in advance?
templates.content: We do have a scheduled delivery option for selected areas within the US for a small fee of $69 to $129. Simply reach out to us at 1-(855)-580-EMMA to confirm if your shipping address is within our serviceable areas. Outside of this, you can expect to receive your mattress within 2-5 business days of placing your order.

templates.name: Cancel / edit order
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to live chat with one of our reps via the website, give us a call at +1-888-580-3662, or send us an email at support@emma-sleep.com. We'll be happy to help!

templates.name: Is the Emma CliMax Hybrid Vegan?
templates.content: Yes, the Emma Mattress is 100 % vegan and does not contain any animal-based materials. Unfortunately, the mattress is inedible. The foam used to make the Emma mattresses is CertiPUR-US® and Class I (16.0.93305) of STANDARD 100 by OEKO-TEX®, which means it is suitable even for infants.

templates.name: Do I need a Box Spring with my Emma Mattress?
templates.content: Using a box spring is optional when using your Emma mattress, as it's compatible with any type of bed frame.

templates.name: Can I wash my Emma CliMax Cover?
templates.content: The UltraDry® cover is removable and washable! Simply unzip the cover all the way around to remove it. Washable below 140°F, you can also handwash with gentle detergent on smaller stains.

templates.name: Can I wash my Emma Original Cover?
templates.content: The UltraDry® cover is removable and washable! Simply unzip the cover all the way around to remove it. Washable below 140°F, you can also handwash with gentle detergent on smaller stains.

templates.name: Order status/order tracking
templates.content: You can use our convenient online tool to see the latest updates on your order: https://www.emma-sleep.com/a/order-status

templates.name: What are the dimensions of your mattresses?
templates.content:
Emma Mattresses come in 6 sizes: 

Twin: 39" x 75"
Twin XL: 39" x 80"
Full: 54" x 75"
Queen: 60" x 80"
King: 76" x 80"
California King: 72" x 84"

templates.name: How long can my Emma CliMax stay in the box?
templates.content: We recommend that the Emma Mattress be opened within 4 weeks of delivery to ensure its quality.

templates.name: How long can my Emma stay in the box?
templates.content: We recommend that the Emma Mattress be opened within 4 weeks of delivery to ensure its quality.

templates.name: Size Chart: All - Clothes
templates.content: You can take a look at our size chart here: https://www.emma-sleep.com/pages/mattress-size-guide
